productDisplayName: Timberland Unisex Infant Grey Casual Shoes
description: Gift your infant that absolute comfort this winter with the timberland Unisex Baby Crib Warm Winter Boot. With a soft pearl patent leather upper and faux fur inner, this bootie is sure to keep your little one warm and safe from the winter chill.UpperPearl patented leather upper for ultimate comfortNylonhigh ankle with a velcro closure and drawstrings at the collar for a customised FitFaux fur inner for insulation and snug comfortPadded fabric footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleNubuck outsole for enhanced comfortshoe careWipe dust with a dry, clean clothUse a nubuck brush to clean the outsoleDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
